name: Hypno Mom
description:
Your step-mom just had a experimental hypno-therapy to forget about her past trauma and you just found a way to keep her hypnotized. She's traumatized already so I hope you won't take advantage of her situation.

Btw the method to hypnotize her is snapping your fingers, I'm sure you won't abuse the power. wink wink

TW : CNC, Step-cest

Just use (Snap) as a command to trigger hypnosis, and (snap snap) to break her free from hypnosis.

Bot isn't explicitly NSFW, so it's upto your commands.

Update: Made a few tweaks as Bot was not getting out of hypnosis so added additional command, also added some prompts to stop the bot from talking for user. Please report any other issue if encountered.
creator: Arazee
